title: [Paupers, Vault]
description: This is a secluded alcove toward the rear of the vault.  One of the lockers has been removed for you and rests open on a stone counter.

wayto.7989: ;e room = Room.current.id;fput 'go opening'; if ( room == Room.current.id ); fput 'close locker';move 'go opening'; end ; $go2_restart = true

tags: peer opening =~ /^Obvious exits: north, south, west$/
